prompt: A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in {argument name="ink color" default="blue"} ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. {argument name="setting" default="Casual desk setting"}, shot on iPhone.
translatedPrompt: 一张逼真的照片，展示一本平摊开的圆点笔记本，上面密密麻麻地写满了 {argument name="ink color" default="blue"} 圆珠笔手写笔记。字迹随性且略显凌乱，如同学习笔记一般，带有自然的瑕疵、涂改的痕迹和下划线标题。从上方略微俯拍，自然光从窗户射入，无闪光灯。{argument name="setting" default="Casual desk setting"}，使用 iPhone 拍摄。

breakdown.creativeCore: 逼真的手写学习笔记：生成一张逼真的照片，展示在自然光下，用圆珠笔书写的凌乱、随性的手写笔记摊开在笔记本上。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: App Store 截图、产品概念、移动工具界面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
